content.en:
At this time.

Many cultivators gathered here at the Devouring Mountain, and they didn't dare to approach or attack the Devouring Mountain.

Before, the cultivators who attacked the Devouring Mountain were all devoured by the Devouring Mountain.

There was a half-step Eternal Master who only attacked once, and he was targeted by the Devouring Mountain, and he couldn't escape.

Of course, if you don't attack the Devouring Mountain, it doesn't seem to be very dangerous.

At this time, an eternal master introduced: "Devouring Mountain, seeing it again, don't you want to die to attack it, its current strength is comparable to that of an ordinary first-domain master, but once it attacks it, it will absorb energy to increase its strength, even if it is a nine-domain level master attacking it, it will eventually be consumed by it." "

"Is there really a great opportunity for the Peak Controller, the Devouring Mountain?" asked a half-step Eternal Master.

"Great opportunity?" said with a smile from the peak controller, "It's just a special life, similar to the Black Silent Sea, what chance have you found in the Black Silent Sea, anyway, I haven't seen anyone find any chance on the Devouring Mountain." "

After the Peak Controllers said this, many half-step Eternal Masters lost interest.

If there was a big chance, maybe they would dare to risk being killed, but now there seems to be no chance.

Airplanes!!!!

A figure appeared, and it was Ye Tian.

Here he came, his eyes on the Devouring Mountain.

"Sure enough, it's the Devouring Mountain!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

The most important thing is that this Devouring Mountain has not absorbed much energy yet, it is only the strength of a domain-level controller, if its strength is too strong, he will have to wait for a long time to let its energy consumption and strength decrease before he dares to devour it.

Now, there is no need to worry.

Immediately, Ye Tian was about to go to the Devouring Mountain.

At this time, the master of the peak persuaded him: "Your Excellency, this devouring mountain cannot be attacked, even if your Excellency is strong, it can't. Those peak Legendary Realm Lords or half-step Eternal Masters were killed, and they were just clones, and our Eternal Masters were a true body, and if they were killed, they would really fall. Although its current strength is weak, it will chase after it and be very difficult. "

"Thanks for the reminder, but I have a solution. "

Ye Tian said.

Seeing that Ye Tian didn't listen to the dissuasion, he didn't say anything.

After all, he didn't know Ye Tian, so it was good to be able to remind him.

After Ye Tian walked onto the Devouring Mountain, the peak controller sighed: "It's a pity, a seven-domain level controller is about to fall like this." "

What is the concept of a seven-domain level master, he may never be able to step into that level, why should such a strong person die?

The other practitioners were very curious, so they stayed here one by one and did not leave.

They also wanted to know if a seven-domain level Eternal Master would be killed by the Devouring Mountain?

If a seven-domain level Eternal Master died here, it would really be big news.

The Seventh Realm River, the Yanyan Holy Mountain.

Yan Yan's controller also received a summons from his subordinates, knowing that Ye Tian had gone to the Devouring Mountain, and it seemed that he was going to attack the Devouring Mountain.

"My senior brother is so bold that he even dares to provoke the Devouring Mountain!"

Yan Yan's controller sighed.

He didn't dare to provoke, he didn't want to fall yet.

However, he didn't feel that his senior brother was dying.

Ye Tiannai was a personal disciple of the Ten Elements Ancestor, so he naturally understood the horror of the Devouring Mountain, and he definitely had a way to deal with it.

"Let's take a look, I don't know what this senior brother is going to do?"

Curious, Yan Yan's controller directly tore through time and space and went to the Devouring Mountain.

Soon, he rushed here.

"I've seen Yan Yan's master!"

The peak controller said respectfully.

"Hmm!"

Yan Yan's controller nodded slightly, but he didn't pay attention to the peak controller.

Ordinary controllers were not qualified to talk to him head-on, and his eyes were only fixed on Ye Tian sitting on the Devouring Mountain.

On the Devouring Mountain.

Ye Tian sat cross-legged, sensing the Devouring Mountain.

At this time, the Devouring Mountain instinctively wanted to absorb Ye Tian's energy, but if Ye Tian didn't attack it, it wouldn't be able to grow, how could it swallow Ye Tian with its strength as a domain-level controller?

"You want to devour me, I'm sorry, I want to devour you too!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

Currently, he has performed his life-devouring technique.

I saw that Ye Tian had turned into a void and was devouring the Devouring Mountain.

Airplanes!!!!

The Devouring Mountain was gradually devoured by Ye Tian, and it kept resisting, but under the Life Devouring Technique, it couldn't resist at all.

As time passed, its size became smaller and smaller, and it was really devoured by Ye Tian.

At this time, the peak controller and others were dumbfounded.

"This master will devour the Devouring Mountain again, I have only heard that the Devouring Mountain devours others, and there are still people who can devour it!"

The Peak Controller exclaimed.

And Yan Yan's controller was also extremely shocked, he still underestimated his senior brother's ability, it was terrifying.

What kind of secret technique is this, and it can be done to such an extent.

Soon, when the Eternal Masters heard the news, they came, and everyone was very surprised.

"Devouring a devouring mountain, if it really succeeds, it will definitely be of great benefit. Who is this Eternal Master, and if we obtain his secret art, won't we be able to devour the Devouring Mountain too?"

These eternal masters are greedy.

Suddenly.

A seven-domain level eternal master has made a move, he wants to destroy Ye Tian's devouring, maybe he can severely damage Ye Tian, and then capture Ye Tian and ask for a secret technique.

But at the moment when he made a move, he was resisted by Yan Yan's controller.

"Mohai, what do you want to do?"

Yan Yan asked.

"What are you doing? Hehe, this Eternal Controller is not the Controller of our Seventh Realm River, he made a move on him, Yanyan Controller, are you going to stop me?" the Mohai Controller questioned.

The Mohai controller is not afraid of Yan Yan's controller, he also has a background.

His master was an eighth-level master of the Origin Realm Sea, so he had no scruples.

"He's my senior brother, why do you think I'm stopping you. "

Yan Yan is in control.

"Senior brother?"

The Mohai master was a little jealous.

If it was the official disciple of the Ten Elements Ancestor, then he couldn't afford to mess with it.

Of course, if it's just a registered disciple, it doesn't matter.

At this moment, Yan Yan's master said: "Mohai, you have to think clearly, even if it is your master, you can't afford to offend my senior brother!"

When the Mohai controller heard this, his expression changed.

Could it be that this is the personal disciple of the Ten Elements Ancestor?

"I'll give you this face!"

The master of the sea is gone.
